channel.title: E-Yor Build Log
channel.description: Recent content on E-Yor Build Log

item.title: About E-Yor
item.description:
What is E-Yor?

E-Yor is a smart 4WD electric utility carrier I’m building for our rural homestead in Ontario. It’s designed to haul heavy loads across rough terrain — stumps, firewood, tools, sheet goods — and eventually follow me around the property autonomously, carrying whatever I’m working with. I will use it to plow snow, Zamboni the ice on our pond, power tools when I’m away from the house, and pull the kids on their toboggans.

item.title: Entry 001 — Concept, Design Decisions, and the Software Stack
item.description: The origin of E-Yor, the hardware and software architecture decisions, and why I’m building a prototype called RoBug before committing to the full build.

item.title: Entry 000 — The Problem
item.description: Our rural Ontario property is beautiful, rocky, and exhausting to work on. This is why E-Yor needs to exist.
